Author: Rey Alex
Name: Gpose Cast
Description: A compact GPose casting tool. Search visible actors, import overworld players into GPose for Brio/Ktisis, build a picked group, and hide everyone else locally for cleaner screenshots.
Punchline: Build a picked GPose cast and hide everyone else.
Changelog: Patch-day rebuild pass: version bump, safer restore behavior for previously hidden non-player actors, and guarded release packaging.
